display_text: Tusk Aghanim's Scepter: Adds Walrus Kick, which counters mobility and clumping by kicking an enemy unit, stunning and slowing them while damaging nearby heroes. This upgrade turns Tusk into a disruption tool, ideal for breaking enemy formations and isolating key targets.
search_text: Tusk Aghanim Scepter Walrus Kick anti-mobility clumping isolation disruption

display_text: Tusk Aghanim's Shard: Enhances Ice Shards to trap enemies more effectively with a slow and damage-over-time effect. This counters melee heroes and escape attempts, solidifying Tusk's role as a zoning and area control specialist.
search_text: Tusk Aghanim Shard Ice Shards anti-melee zoning area control escape counter
